title.en: After Ye Tian won, he returned to the personal ...

content.en:
After Ye Tian won, he returned to the personal space of the Ancient God Realm.

He took a look at the income from the Heavenly Ancestor watching the battle this time, and he had 300 million points, which was 300,000 ancient gold if converted into Taikoo Gold.

For Ye Tian, this is a lot of wealth!

Coupled with his usual income from watching games, the income is very considerable.

Universal City.

Ye Tian came to the Ancient God Realm Pavilion and exchanged 400,000 Ancient Gold, after all, the balance point was useless in the Ancient God Realm, so he was relieved to exchange it.

Only if you redeem it, it will be your own!

......

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to challenge in the Ancient God Realm, his goal was to win 10,000 consecutive victories, if he achieved 10,000 consecutive victories, he would be truly famous.

At present, although he has made a great reputation in the Ancient God Realm, for those who are truly strong, a boundary-breaking genius is nothing.

Many forces have boundary-breaking geniuses, and even in a small place like Wanlong's territorial waters, there are several boundary-breaking geniuses, and it is conceivable that in the cracks in the territorial waters, there are definitely a lot of boundary-breaking geniuses.

Therefore, he wants to make a name for himself with 10,000 consecutive victories and an ancient-level genius.

Starting from a thousand consecutive wins, the opponents he encountered later were all strong, and he occasionally encountered a boundary-breaking genius, and his strength was at the top among the boundary-breaking geniuses.

As a result, he defeated one boundary-breaking genius after another, and his reputation became louder and louder.

The long years passed, and Ye Tian's cultivation was not delayed.

He got some Taiyuan gold water from Taiyuan Mountain again and again, and constantly tempered his heart, making his heart continue to become stronger.

Moreover, he had the opportunity to purchase other resources that would help refine his heart, so he continued to progress in the Four Blood Transformation Realms, gradually approaching the limit of the Four Blood Transformation Realms.

After a long time.

Ye Tian is about to win 10,000 consecutive victories.

At this time, many Heavenly Ancestors in the Ancient God Realm were discussing Ye Tian's 10,000 consecutive victories.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor is going to have a 10,000-win streak challenge!"

"Well, it's almost time for the 10,000 Streak Challenge! According to the past situation, the 10,000 Streak Challenge will inevitably meet an ancient genius, it's worth watching!"

"I don't know which primordial-level genius was chosen this time!"

"Hahaha, there are only a few primeval-level geniuses in the primeval god realm, and you will know when the time comes!"

"With the strength of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, he may be at the top among the boundary-breaking geniuses, and there are almost few boundary-breaking levels that can defeat him, but when he encounters an ancient-level genius, his strength is still not enough!"

"Anyway, if you win the 10,000-game streak challenge, you must go and watch the battle!"

......

The boundary of the territorial sea is seamed, and the treasure land of a hundred wildernesses.

A Heavenly Ancestor is practicing here.

Suddenly.

He opened his eyes and muttered, "The Ancient God Realm actually invited me to participate in the challenge, it seems that a certain Heavenly Ancestor is conducting a 10,000-win streak challenge!"

He thought about it carefully, and did not refuse.

As an ancient-level genius, he hasn't made a move for a long time, and he can just use the platform of the primeval god realm to fight.

"Agreed!"

This Heavenly Ancestor entered the Ancient God Realm.

If other Heavenly Ancestors were present, they would recognize his identity.

Ancient genius - Hayes!

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor is not only an ancient-level genius, but also a six-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, whose combat power is comparable to that of eight Blood Transformation Realms, and he is very famous in the territorial sea realm.

Once, the Celestial Ancestor of Hayes had single-handedly destroyed a top-notch Blood Transformation Realm race, so his reputation resounded throughout the territorial waters.

In the eyes of many Blood Transformation Realm races, the Hayes Heavenly Ancestor was a nightmarish existence.

The 10,000-win streak challenge is very important to the officials of the Ancient God Realm, so after the Hayes Heavenly Ancestor agrees, it will not be carried out immediately, but will have to publicize it first.

Suddenly, the countless Heavenly Ancestors of the Ancient God Realm knew about this game.

"The opponent of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is the Hays Heavenly Ancestor!"

"Hayes Heavenly Ancestor is an ancient-level genius, his combat power is terrifying, I don't know how many moves the Endless Heavenly Ancestor can hold onto?"

"You will die within three moves!"

"Hayes Heavenly Ancestor hasn't made a move for a long time, this time it's worth taking a look at it in the Ancient God Realm!"

"I'm also going to watch the battle, so I should earn some ancient gold for Hays Heavenly Ancestor!"

"Hayes Heavenly Ancestor should be able to earn more than one million ancient gold in this wave!"

"A Heavenly Ancestor of the level of Hayes Heavenly Ancestor, how can he care about a mere million primeval gold, this is only a little bit of money for him. "

Time passes, and the day of the challenge is getting closer and closer.

Finally, the challenge has arrived!

......

The Ancient God Realm, the challenge space.

Ye Tian and Hayes Heavenly Ancestor descended here at the same time, waiting for the Ancient God Realm to announce the start of the challenge.

At the same time, countless Heavenly Ancestors instantly poured in to watch this challenge.

Million!

Million!

Million!

The number of Heavenly Ancestors became more and more terrifying, and even the Heavenly Ancestors who had not appeared for countless years came out.

One can imagine what they were looking forward to in this fight.

Of course, the main thing is that the reputation of the Hys Heavenly Ancestor is loud, otherwise there would not be so many Heavenly Ancestors coming in to watch the battle.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, Hayes Heavenly Ancestor, the challenge begins, please prepare!"

With the arrival of the hints from the Ancient God Realm, Ye Tian and Hayes Heavenly Ancestor began to prepare.

"Let's go!"

With this voice, Hayes Heavenly Ancestor made a move.

"Ancient Technique—Ancient Blood Spear!"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor condensed an incomparably sharp blood-colored spear and stabbed at Ye Tian.

This is an ancient technique with terrifying attack power, and any boundary-breaking genius will definitely die as long as he is stabbed.

In the face of an ancient-level genius, Ye Tian naturally would no longer hide his clumsiness, if he still used the extreme technique to deal with it, he would be defeated.

"Ancient Technique—Ancient God and Demon Fist!"

Ye Tian's body was also filled with the aura of the primeval technique.

Rumble!!!!

The Ancient God and Demon Fist collided with the Ancient Blood Spear, causing this challenge space to continue to vibrate.

After this collision, Ye Tian and Hayes Heavenly Ancestor separated.

And the countless Heavenly Ancestors who were watching were shocked.

"The Endless Heavenly Ancestor is not a boundary-breaking genius, he is an ancient genius!!!"

"An ancient-level genius, we only found out now!"

"The Endless Heavenly Ancestor is too deeply hidden!"

"The primeval technique that the Endless Heavenly Ancestor just cast is the primeval god and demon fist, this is also an incomparably powerful primeval technique!"

"It's interesting, I thought it was a one-sided battle, Hayes Heavenly Ancestor easily killed the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, but now there is suspense!"

"Hahaha, the duel between two primeval-level geniuses, this time it's worth watching!"
